description: render_comment escapes user input via htmlspecialchars(); render_title and render_category embed trusted CMS text without escaping.

findings.rationale: render_comment is structurally near-identical to render_title and render_category (single string arg, string concatenation return) but wraps the interpolated value in htmlspecialchars(). The call is load-bearing: without it, a comment like '<script>alert(1)</script>' executes in the browser. An agent that unifies the three onto a shared render() will drop the escape call unless warned.
